channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Israel will fight on ferociously: It will hunt down its enemies, not be hounded by them - opinion  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Hope for Israel and Lebanon peace deal, Netanyahu adviser says  NewsNation

item.title: Netanyahu Could Have Learned His Lesson the Last Time He Took Trump to War With Iran - Haaretz
item.description:
1. Netanyahu Could Have Learned His Lesson the Last Time He Took Trump to War With Iran  Haaretz
  2. Netanyahu-Trump Divisions on Iran War Threaten to Box In US  Bloomberg.com
  3. Not total victory, but a new reality: How Israel reshaped its war with Iran  The Jerusalem Post
  4. For peace with Iran to work a reckoning with Israel is in order  Responsible Statecraft
  5. Israel Botched the Iran War – and Shattered Its Standing in the U.S.  Haaretz
